title: Wand App Declaration
description: Declares a wand app (protocol v2): identity, entitlements, phases, tools, directory contract, presentation, and phase gate checks

version.description: Manifest protocol version. v1 ('1.0', kind/kindVersion/subdirTemplate) is no longer recognized.

appId.description: Globally-unique reverse-DNS app identifier with exactly 3 segments: <publisher>.<domain>.<slug>. The first segment is a publisher prefix assigned by the runtime or distribution platform, which guarantees global uniqueness at publish time.

appVersion.description: Semantic version of this wand app

displayName.description: Human-readable app name for UI display. Provided by the user at creation time.

alias.description: User-set rename alias. Overrides displayName in lists and mention search; does not change appId/displayName.

description.description: Short description of this wand app (UI + LLM retrieval)

minPlatformVersion.description: Minimum wand platform protocol the app requires. Declarative only for now.

directoryContract.description: Directory structure contract for wand instances

folderName.description: Folder name that groups this app's instances. The runtime owns the layout and always assembles wands/<folderName>/<wandId>.wand under its data area; the manifest never declares a path template.

path.description: File path relative to wand root

managedByBuiltin.description: If true, this file is managed by the wand infrastructure

requiredFiles.description: Files that must exist in every instance

requiredSubdirs.description: Subdirectories to create in every instance

path.description: Destination path relative to wand root

templatePath.description: Source template path relative to kind root

initialFiles.description: Files to copy from templates on instance creation

phaseFlowMode.description: Phase transition semantics: 'linear' = phases[] order is the flow; 'free' = CheckPhase must pass next_phase

id.description: Phase identifier; must match the wand/phases/<id>/ subdirectory name

mode.description: 'allow' = only items[] visible; 'deny' = all except items[] visible

items.description: Tool names for the allow/deny list

prompt.description: Override description that replaces the tool's default prompt segment

overrides.description: Per-tool prompt overrides for this phase

allowGlobs.description: Glob patterns for allowed file writes relative to wand root (picomatch)

cleanupOnRewind.description: Glob patterns of files to trash when this phase is skipped by RewindWand (linear mode only)

mode.description: 'script' = run check.js (derived path wand/phases/<id>/check.js); 'prompt' = run check.md (derived path wand/phases/<id>/check.md) via an isolated judge inference loop

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for CheckPhase tool inputs (validated before invoking the check)

passCriteria.description: Required for mode='prompt': natural-language pass criteria injected into the judge's system prompt

timeout.description: Override default 120000ms timeout for the check

entitlements.description: Capability declarations (iOS-entitlements analog). Everything the app may reach beyond the per-phase tool/file sandbox is declared here. Extensible: future capabilities (network, filesystem escapes, ...) slot in as new keys.

mcpServers.description: Names of external MCP servers this wand activates while open (wand-level, constant across phases). The runtime resolves the names to configured servers and keeps them active for the wand session. Per-phase tool visibility is still governed by phases[].tools.items.

icon.description: Identity-facet icon: a kindRoot-relative svg/png path, or a built-in lucide icon name (e.g. 'wand-2'). Used by app headers, cards, and the file-explorer document-package opener. Runtimes provide a default when absent.

presentation.description: Presentation-facet declaration: the wand's own custom view(s). Single-page HTML bundles loaded in a sandboxed iframe, driven by the host JSAPI (/__wandhost__/sdk.js). See spec/presentation.md and spec/host-api.md.

static.description: Static (kind-level) view — 'what this wand is'. Shipped with the kind.

entry.description: kindRoot-relative path to the entry HTML. Default 'view/static/index.html'.

runtime.description: Runtime (instance-level) view — the produced artifact. Lives in the instance dir; edited by the agent during a session.

entry.description: wandDir-relative path to the entry HTML. May point directly at the artifact's main HTML (e.g. 'index.html' of a slide deck) or at a dedicated 'view/runtime/index.html'. Served with the instance dir as root.

watch.description: Globs (relative to wandDir) whose changes refresh the runtime view. Filtered host-side; unset = all changes pass through.

autoOpen.description: When true, the file explorer treats the instance folder as a document package (single-opener) and opens this view on click.

shell.description: When true, the host wraps the view in a native shell (phase track, status, nav/actions, export). Default false = full-page.

engineeringTools.description: Tools not exposed to the LLM, triggered by the host UI or orchestration

scriptPath.description: Path to handler script relative to kind root
